name: Meltwater Media Intelligence & Social Listening API
what_it_does: Meltwater REST API for media intelligence and social listening platform. Enables AI agents to access media monitoring and news article search across 300,000+ sources, handle social media listening and brand mention tracking, retrieve sentiment analysis and media analytics, manage influencer discovery and relationship data, access competitive intelligence and share-of-voice metrics, retrieve editorial contact database (Meltwater Newswire/Cision rival), handle PR distribution and media outreach data, access earned media value and campaign analytics, retrieve real-time news alerts and monitoring feeds, and integrate media intelligence with CRM and marketing platforms.
use_cases: Monitoring brand mentions and news coverage from PR and brand intelligence agents
Accessing sentiment and share-of-voice analytics from marketing intelligence agents
Retrieving competitive coverage and media analytics from competitive intelligence agents
Integrating media monitoring with CRM from communications automation agents
not_for: Real-time social media management without media monitoring focus
Small businesses without PR and communications team investment
Single-market media monitoring without global news coverage
best_when: A PR team, brand manager, or communications team using Meltwater wants AI agents to automate media monitoring, sentiment tracking, brand coverage analysis, competitive intelligence, and PR analytics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Media monitoring aggregates third-party news and social content — republication of monitored content may infringe copyright. Social data contains personal information of individuals mentioned in coverage. Influencer contact database requires GDPR-compliant handling. Automated outreach using media contacts requires opt-in consent.

auth.notes: Meltwater uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials with monitoring, analytics, and intelligence scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for real-time news and mention alerts. News API (formerly Meltwater News API) for content access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise media intelligence subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Module-based subscription; Essentials, Suite, Enterprise tiers
pricing.notes: Oslo, Norway. Founded 2001. Market leader for media intelligence and PR technology. $600M+ annual revenue. 27,000+ customers in 150 countries. 300,000+ news sources monitored. Acquired Sysomos (social analytics), Klear (influencer), and others. Competes with Brandwatch and Cision for media intelligence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; news search API throttled

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Media monitoring aggregates third-party content — republication and redistribution restrictions apply
Influencer and journalist contact database is personal data — GDPR and CAN-SPAM compliance for outreach automation
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
News content licensing — full article text access may have redistribution restrictions beyond metadata
Social data completeness varies by platform — Twitter/X data access limited post-API pricing changes
Automated PR outreach using Meltwater contact database requires explicit opt-in consent
agent_readiness.security_notes: Media monitoring and social data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Third-party content and journalist PII governance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Media intelligence and social data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Content licensing and journalist PII.
